title: coppensia orthostates
intro: Coppensia orthostates is a plant species, also known as the "Tall-stemmed Coppensia" or "Orthostachys orthostates", which belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Coppensia orthostates include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Coppensia orthostates can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
